metadata.description: Reusable coding-agent plugins packaged for Claude Code

plugins.name: bento
plugins.description: Complete Bento skill pack with workflow, tracker, stack, and repository cleanup skills

plugins.name: trackers
plugins.description: Tracker skills for Beads and GitHub Issues workflows

plugins.name: stacks
plugins.description: Stack-specific engineering skills for Go/Postgres, React/Vite/Mantine, and GraphQL

plugins.name: session-id
plugins.description: SessionStart hook that writes the Claude Code session ID to ~/.claude/session_id

plugins.name: intent-stories
plugins.description: Durable intent story documentation and fidelity auditing skills for coding agents

plugins.name: bugshot
plugins.description: Ephemeral screenshot gallery for visual bug review and issue filing

plugins.name: storystore
plugins.description: Intent-story documentation with audits, guarded edits, and impact checks
